title: 未来がわかる魔法かも？

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: A good day to you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I, I asked for help making clothes for my plushie...
But...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
We're struggling to come up with any design
ideas. And that's why we're going to go for a
stroll.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
There's excitement to be found throughout the
academy, so ideas are bound to follow. Care to
join us, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not one to turn down a direct invitation, I decide
to go for a walk with them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Come, this is our first stop.
choice_data_list: Don't we need permission to go inside?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
"In exchange for your cooperation with future
research, you may observe whatever you wish
to..." Those were Tachyon's exact words.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
This place truly kindles the imagination. Inside a
dimly lit research facility hidden deep in the
woods, a vividly colored mushroom suspended
within a test tube glows with an odd light—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you're right! And there's a huge cloud of
smoke, too...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Poof!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
And this is our next stop. Here, it will be possible
to immerse ourselves in nature without ever
leaving campus.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
U-um... Bright, can we stop? I think my bad luck
will get us in trouble again, just like it did on our
last stop...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there was no trouble at all. Your imagination
was spot on back there! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Now, let's enjoy our next destination to the
fullest. Come along, let's go! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: And here we are.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure... But it looks just like the place I
imagined earlier!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teehee. ♪ Well? Look closely now... Is this
helping you to picture what you'd like to make?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Dark, but sparkling, and flowery... I think I know
what kind of clothes I'd like to make!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that Rice Shower has a general design idea,
it's time to get to work. But there's one problem...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...Ngh. One more time. Start over, but with neater
stitches!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...No, this won't do either. Again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower has been sewing and undoing her
progress over and over since we got here. It
seems like something's bothering her...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
What's troubling you? It looked to me as though
you were about to finish the outfit just now.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You did so much for me, Bright. Helping
brainstorm the design, drafting the pattern... I
want to do my part and make the outfit perfect.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But then a loose stitch or a wrinkle turns up... and
I just can't ignore those. I'm sorry this is taking so
long!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Not at all! I shall assist you for as long as you
need. But, yes... Why don't we try chanting some
magic words together?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: It'll help us make progress, one tidy stitch at a time. Let's say, "You will be lovely"... Now then, all together. ♪

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Magic words.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...Okay. If it'll help the clothes turn out cute, I'll
give it a try!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: One stitch at a time... You will be lovely! You will become wonderful clothes!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: D-done!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I actually did it! And it came out just how I
imagined—like a fairy playing in the forest at
night!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With some help from a few magic words... Rice
Shower overcomes the hurdles to sew her clothes
together surprisingly smoothly!
choice_data_list: Your magic words worked wonders, Bright.
Your magic words worked wonders, Bright.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teehee. No, no. I simply offered one final push at
the end.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
When Rice said she wanted to make an adorable
outfit...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I could tell there would be no stopping her from
doing just that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
And after the first step is taken, all that remains is
to keep walking. If the second foot doesn't know
where to go, a little push is all it takes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
One needn't be fast or confident. A couple
detours are fine. All that matters is that you keep
moving.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
We wandered our way to Rice's goal one step at a
time... And what a wonderful time it was. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get it now... Bright was leading Rice to believe in
herself—and give her the strength to carry on.
choice_data_list:
And to keep on moving forward, you need
stamina.

And to keep on moving forward, you need
stamina.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get it now... Bright was leading Rice to believe in
herself—and give her the strength to carry on.
choice_data_list:
And to keep on moving forward, you need
stamina.

And to keep on moving forward, you need
stamina.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Very true. However, that will not be an issue.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I happen to enjoy long, drawn-out battles.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She speaks calmly, but I can't help sensing both
strength and fortitude in her words...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
U-um, thanks! I mean it! Do you have any other
tips? I want to learn from your example!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
My goodness! Teehee. Hearing you both say such
kind things really is an honor. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The key to success... You must rest to be at your
best! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright smiles as she offers some
spontaneous advice. But her ability to steadily
strive ahead is the real deal, and I find myself
wanting to learn from her approach.
